text.title: Founder Led Qualification Rubric Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for Founder Led Qualification Rubric.

step.name: gather-discovery
step.input: Inbound notes, discovery transcripts, ICP doc
step.action: Compile the evidence per prospect; pin sources.

step.name: apply-5-checks
step.action: Set each check yes/no with citation. Ambiguous → no.

step.name: verdict
step.action: Count no's. 3+ no → disqualified. 0-1 no → qualified. 2 no → borderline (additional 30m discovery).

step.name: route
step.action: qualified → proposal queue; disqualified → kill-rule; borderline → follow-up + re-evaluate within 7d.

step.name: log-for-retro
step.action: Append to qualification log for quarterly retro on threshold accuracy.
